codexConfig.normalizedText:
default_permissions = "c3-task"
web_search = "disabled"

[mcp_servers.goodmemory]
command = "goodmemory-mcp"
args = ["--host", "codex"]
[mcp_servers.goodmemory.env]
GOODMEMORY_HOME = "<home>"
GOODMEMORY_MANAGED_BY = "goodmemory"

[features]
# goodmemory-managed-hooks-section
hooks = true # goodmemory-managed-hooks

[permissions.c3-task.filesystem]
":root" = "deny"
":minimal" = "read"
"<host-path-058>" = "deny"
"<host-path-049>" = "deny"
"<host-path-003>" = "deny"
"<host-path-052>" = "deny"
"<host-path-050>" = "deny"
"<host-path-045>" = "deny"
"<host-path-025>" = "deny"
"<host-path-054>" = "deny"
"<host-path-039>" = "deny"
"<arm-root>" = "deny"
"<codex-home>" = "deny"
"<codex-home>/auth.json" = "deny"
"<codex-home>/config.toml" = "deny"
"<package-prefix>" = "deny"
"<host-path-041>" = "deny"

[permissions.c3-task.filesystem.":workspace_roots"]
"." = "write"

[permissions.c3-task.network]
enabled = false
